parameters: [\n[1] went to take a bath, he won't be coming back out for a bit.]
After receiving that message, I used the spare key and headed to uncle's room.
I've always had a spare key to their place, just in case something
happened, so there was nothing strange about it.
...And I also knew of his habit of taking long baths.
Why wouldn't I? I'm the girl closest to him.
...So why exactly am I doing this? I couldn't help but wonder.
I shook my head, and forced out all my rational thoughts.
Nobody else decided this for me... I myself did.
I knocked on the room's door, which was heavier than \n[1]'s door.
It slowly opened after I waited a while.
...I've been inside \n[1]'s room countless times, but this might be
the first time I'm entering uncle's room, at least from what I know.
My honest impression: It was a clean room.
Tidy bookshelves, and a dust free floor. I couldn't help but admire
how he'd maintained the room even with such a busy daily schedule.
\SE[2]You think? Thank you. I was inviting a young girl like you in,
so I didn't want to make a fool of myself.
\SE[30-nb]Thank you very much for caring so much. Ahahah, if only
\n[1] could learn from you... if only.
At that time... I was a bit drunk, you see.
It's still not too late, you can just forget about what we talked about on the phone...
\SE[14]No, please let me do... what I can.
\SE[18]In return, if you could keep this a secret from everyone... \n[1] in
Of course, I promise you that.
\SE[21]So then, just what should I do now?
I interrupted uncle's words and forced the conversation to continue.
Because if I didn't, all the courage I'd painfully gathered would disappear.
\SE[4]It really is hard to ask for this, but...
\SE[30-nb]You've taken care of us so much until now, uncle.
-- Not to mention, I may be the real cause behind what you two
As a man, after many years of solitude, there are certain
I knew what those emotions were. It shocked me when he first
mentioned them, but I later realized it was only natural.
He'd likely been suppressing himself all this time. For his family. For us.
I gotta do something for him.
Compared to mom and onee-chan, who work so hard...
This is all that my inexperienced self can do.
...I should be happy that I can at least do this.
The guilt would just have crushed me otherwise.
Would you mind, if I touched your chest?
[演出]opacity/キャラの不透明度変更
相対値指定フラグ = def
[演出]opacity/キャラの不透明度変更
相対値指定フラグ = def
I took off my clothes, and bared my chest in front of uncle.
The shame of showing off my breasts like this tormented me, but
I was the one who said I'd do anything.
It'd be disrespectful to oji-san, to get cold feet here.
I bit my own lips hard, and tried to maintain my composure.
Sorry, it's been so long that I'm getting quite excited,
despite my age. ...It's pathetic, isn't it?
Do you hate doing this? I know I'm the one who
made you do this, but still.
..If I had to be honest, I did. I couldn't help that.
Having my body used as an outlet for sexual desires. And not by
the man I love... but rather someone much older than us.
But, if I told him that honestly, I really would feel sorry for uncle.
If I was going to just get him all hopeful only to turn him down last minute,
I wouldn't have suggested it in the first place.
Uhm... I'm sorry. It's my first time, doing something like this...
I can tell... and here I thought you'd already done it with \n[1]...
No, I didn't mean to say that. ...I'm sorry.
My body twitched, reacting to the name that I was trying not to think about.
While he's in the bath, his childhood friend... girlfriend is doing
something like this... he probably can't even consider it.
Well then, my apologies but... I'm going to touch them now.
His hands gently touched my chest.
Though losing my bearings at that sensation, I tried to relax my
body and accept uncle's sexual desires.
I'm sorry... I really am. Forgive me for not being
able to control my own foolish desires...
Nnn--... please don't apologize... I'm the one... nnn---....
who asked you to do this so....
Seeing him apologize with such sincere eyes, my shame, disgust, and
the alienness of it compared to our daily lives gradually started disappearing.
...The years must have worn him down so much, he's even
apologizing to someone much younger than him like me.
Thinking along those lines, I started to feel that my own current
Thank you. Still, you truly have such beautiful skin.
The texture is so fine, it's gripping onto my palms...
It's almost like silk... truly beautiful.
Even amazing, well respected adults like him, ones that I could never
measure up to, have weak points like these, huh?
This might be the only part of me that can stand on equal footing to a man like him.
When I looked at this situation from that perspective, I could feel
my body slowly starting to heat up.
Thank you very much, for all the compliments...--
Uhm... you don't need to, be so gentle with me.
My guilt, and my elation too... I suppressed all my emotions the best
I could, and spent some strange time together with uncle.
...He might be coming out of the bath soon.
...Thanks for what you did today, Shino-kun. I really am sorry.
\sa[130]\se[31-nb]No, it's nothing. I'm going to... go now, okay?
I'd come here today to atone for my sins,
But... he only touched my breasts, and didn't release any
of the pent up desires buried in his lower body.
He was probably... trying to be considerate of me.
スライドスピード = def
Without waiting for his reply, I quickly
made my way out of the room.
On the way out, I felt \n[1]'s presence in the bath still, and both breathed
out a sigh of relief as well as felt all sorts of emotions running through me.
I decided to tell him the truth once it was all over. Hoping, believing... that the day
would come when the relationship between them that I broke would someday fix itself.
